source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local state surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.6
distilled_thesis: Joy is locally remeasured here: blessed happiness is no longer mere possession but something judged by its capacity to be given.
